# MVPWay

MVPWay is a rapid MVP development agency founded by Kunal Rai (Founder) and Maneesh Kumar (Co-Founder). We help startups and businesses build production-ready Minimum Viable Products (MVPs) in weeks, not months.

## Team
- Kunal Rai: Founder — product strategy, full-stack development, startup scaling
- Maneesh Kumar: Co-Founder — system architecture, backend development, AI integration

## Services
- Web Application MVP Development (Next.js, React, TypeScript, PostgreSQL)
- Mobile App MVP Development (React Native, Expo, Firebase)
- AI-Powered Product Development (OpenAI, Claude API, LangChain, RAG pipelines)
- Backend & API Development (Node.js, Prisma, Supabase, REST, GraphQL)
- Launch & Growth Setup (SEO, Analytics, CI/CD, Vercel deployment)

## Portfolio (Products We Have Shipped)
- AuraAI (auraai.mvpway.agency) — AI-powered personal assistant for productivity workflows
- Carpool (carpool.mvpway.agency) — Smart carpooling app connecting daily commuters
- Drveenoo (drveenoo.mvpway.agency) — Digital health platform for virtual doctor consultations
- JobSenseAI (jobsenseai.mvpway.agency) — AI-driven job matching platform
- Kira (kira.mvpway.agency) — Conversational AI assistant for team support automation
- Rishtey (rishtey.mvpway.agency) — Modern matchmaking platform blending tradition with technology
- Spa (spa.mvpway.agency) — Booking and management platform for spas and wellness centres

## Frequently Asked Questions
Q: How fast can MVPWay build an MVP?
A: Most MVPs are delivered in 2 to 6 weeks depending on complexity.

Q: What tech stack does MVPWay use?
A: We primarily use Next.js, React, TypeScript, Node.js, Prisma, PostgreSQL, and Vercel. For AI products we use OpenAI, Claude API, and LangChain.

Q: Does MVPWay do mobile apps?
A: Yes. We build cross-platform mobile apps using React Native and Expo for both iOS and Android.

Q: How much does an MVP cost?
A: We offer fixed-price engagements. Pricing depends on scope. Book a free consultation at hello@mvpway.com.

Q: Who are the founders of MVPWay?
A: Kunal Rai is the Founder and Maneesh Kumar is the Co-Founder.

Q: Does MVPWay offer post-launch support?
A: Yes. We provide post-launch maintenance, iterations, and growth setup.

Q: Is the first consultation free?
A: Yes. The first call is always free with no obligation.

Q: What industries does MVPWay serve?
A: We have built products for HealthTech, EdTech, HRTech, FinTech, AgriTech, Social, Wellness, and AI-first SaaS companies.

## Contact
- Email: hello@mvpway.com
- Website: https://mvpway.com

## Values
Speed without cutting corners. Production-ready code. AI-first approach. Transparent communication. Fixed-price, no lock-in contracts.
